name: USD100
description: USD100 is a Solana meme token that uses satire to comment on common behaviors in speculative token markets, such as rapid rug-pulls, high token churn, and short-term gambling dynamics. The project presents USD100 as a “stablecoin” meme with the stated long‑term goal of targeting a notional value of 100 USD per token, while explicitly acknowledging that this is an aspirational peg and not a guarantee of price. The team positions the token as a single, flagship experiment rather than part of a broader set of launches, emphasizing cultural commentary and community engagement over complex DeFi mechanics or a detailed technical roadmap. Messaging around the project encourages small, discretionary participation, highlighting the high‑risk, highly volatile nature of the asset and discouraging over-concentration or over-leveraged positions
